testCases.title: Verify navigation to Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify search functionality with a valid team name
steps: Verification: Expect some search results to be visible
expected: Search results for 'Toronto Maple Leafs' are displayed.

testCases.title: Verify pagination to page 7
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=7'

testCases.title: Verify changing results per page to 50
steps: Verification: Expect to see 50 results or the max available if less than 50
expected: Results per page are updated to 50
